content.full_text:
Aunt-in-Law - Not Excluded

Section 82030(b)(5) provides that gifts received from certain relatives including the filer's aunt are not reportable. Ken Finney advised that the term "aunt" did not include aunt-in-law.

embedding.qa_text:
QUESTION: Whether gifts received from an aunt-in-law are excluded from reportable gifts under Section 82030(b)(5), which provides an exemption for gifts from certain relatives including aunts.

CONCLUSION: Gifts from an aunt-in-law are not excluded from reportable gifts, as the term 'aunt' in Section 82030(b)(5) does not include aunt-in-law.
embedding.first_500_words: Aunt-in-Law - Not Excluded Section 82030(b)(5) provides that gifts received from certain relatives including the filer's aunt are not reportable. Ken Finney advised that the term "aunt" did not include aunt-in-law.
embedding.summary: FPPC advice letter clarifying that Section 82030(b)(5)'s exemption for gifts from relatives applies to aunts but not aunt-in-law, making gifts from an aunt-in-law reportable.
